summary: Numerical register from Incahuasi with unusual YB-dominant color (54 cords = 31%). 174 cords, 0 STRING, total 83,449. 36 clusters. 1-PAIRE depth L3. HB(24)/MB(24)/W(30)/AB(11) complement. 11 L-1.
interpretation:
IDENTIFICATION
  174 cords. 0 STRING, 109 INT, 54 EMPTY (31%), 11 L-1.
  Architecture: 1-PAIRE, L3. 36 clusters. Colors: YB(54), W(30), HB(24), MB(24), AB(11).
  Provenance: Incahuasi. Total: 83,449.
  YB-dominant is unique among Incahuasi khipus — a special commodity or seasonal category.

NARRATIVE
  Yellow-brown. That is the dominant color — YB, fifty-four cords, a color seen nowhere else at Incahuasi as the primary thread. Eighty-three thousand units counted across thirty-six short clusters. No words, no labels, only numbers and the unusual color that sets this register apart from every other in the archive.
